name: Sylvan Charity
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>羅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>施</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほどこ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>し
desc: Draw 3 cards, then, if you have a "Sylvan" card in your hand, reveal 2 cards from your hand including at least 1 "Sylvan" card, then place them on the top of the Deck in any order. Otherwise, reveal your entire hand, then place it on the top of the Deck in any order. You can only activate 1 "Sylvan Charity" per turn.
eff: Draw 3 cards, then, if you have a "Sylvan" card in your hand, reveal 2 cards from your hand including at least 1 "Sylvan" card, then place them on the top of the Deck in any order. Otherwise, reveal your entire hand, then place it on the top of the Deck in any order. You can only activate 1 "Sylvan Charity" per turn.

sets.set: Premium Gold: Return of the Bling

action: Places cards from the player's hand on the top of the Deck
